overall.description: A first-person walk through a rainy desert canyon wadi with a flowing stream, flanked by layered rock formations and sparse vegetation, with a distant city skyline visible through the haze. The footage appears to be rendered in a game engine, featuring cinematic lighting and atmospheric rain effects as the camera moves steadily through shallow water.

scene_state.functional_zone: desert canyon wadi with seasonal stream

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through shallow water in the canyon stream, heading toward the distant city skyline

entered.detail: layered sedimentary rock formation forming the left boundary of the wadi
steep rock face with horizontal strata on the right side
shallow flowing water with rocky bottom and rain droplets creating ripples
hazy silhouette of modern buildings visible through the canyon opening
single palm tree growing near the left canyon wall

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person view walking through a rainy desert wadi. The camera moves through shallow water between towering layered rock walls, with sparse palm vegetation on the left and a distant city skyline barely visible through the haze ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: canyon section with dense riparian vegetation

events.description: passing dense patch of green bushes and reeds on the right bank

agents.ego_description: continuing through the stream, navigating around rocks while passing vegetation on the right

entered.detail: thick cluster of green shrubs and tall grasses growing along the right water's edge
exposed rocky bank with cracked earth texture on the left side

segments.scene_description: Moving deeper into the canyon, the right bank becomes lined with dense green vegetation while the left side reveals cracked rocky shores. The rain continues to fall steadily as the camera progresses through the shallow stream, with the canyon walls drawing closer.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow canyon section with waterfall feature

events.description: waterfall becomes visible cascading down the left canyon wall

agents.ego_description: approaching the waterfall while continuing through the deepening stream

entered.detail: small waterfall cascading down the layered rock face on the left side
cluster of palm trees growing on the right canyon slope

segments.scene_description: The canyon narrows further as the camera approaches a waterfall cascading down the left wall. The stream becomes slightly deeper, and palm trees appear on the right slope while the dense vegetation recedes behind. The distant city remains visible ahead through the rainy haze.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a rainy desert wadi that gradually narrows as it leads toward a distant city skyline. It begins by wading through shallow water between towering layered rock walls, with sparse palm vegetation on the left and a hazy urban horizon ahead. As the camera moves deeper into the canyon, the landscape shifts to feature dense green vegetation lining the right bank and cracked rocky shores on the left. The scene then tightens as the canyon walls draw closer, with the stream deepening just before the camera approaches a waterfall cascading down the left wall. Finally, the view opens slightly to reveal palm trees on the right slope while the distant city remains visible through the steady rain.
